text: The agentMom framework shall enable agents to broadcast a message to all agents within the same local network.
The agentMom framework shall enable agents to multicast a message to all agents within the same multicast address.
The agentMom framework shall enable agents to unicast a message to other agents within the organization.
The agentMom framework shall allow agents to choose among unicast, multicast, and broadcast communication.
The agentMom framework shall allow agents to join and leave a multicast group.
The agentMom framework shall provide message encryption and decryption techniques for secured communication.
The agentMom framework shall allow agents to choose whether or not to encrypt a message.
The agentMom framework shall deliver multicast and broadcast packets with best effort.
The network environment shall support multicast protocol to enable multicast messaging.
The agentMom framework shall support the ability to receive unicast messages.
Unicast messages shall only be received by the specified address.
Unicast messages shall arrive at the specified address and in order.
The agentMom framework shall support the ability to send request to join a multicast group.
The agentMom framework shall support the ability to send request to leave a multicast group.
The agentMom framework shall not allow receiving a multicast message from a group before joining that group.
The agentMom framework shall not allow receiving a multicast message from a group after leaving that group.
The agentMom framework shall support the ability to set time-to-live for multicast messages.
The agentMom framework shall support the ability to set multicast address and port for sending and receiving multicast messages.
The agentMom framework shall support the ability to receive multicast messages from multiple groups.
The agentMom framework shall support the ability to receive broadcast messages.
Broadcast messages shall be sent to all possible hosts under the same local network.
The agentMom framework shall support the ability to decrypt unicast messages.
The agentMom framework shall automatically decrypt encrypted messages.
The agentMom framework shall support the ability to encrypt multicast messages.
The agentMom framework shall support the ability to decrypt multicast messages.
The agentMom framework shall support an architecture where the agent directly controls conversations.
The agentMom framework shall support an architecture where agent components control conversations.
The new agentMom framework shall be compatible with agentMom version 1.2.
The software shall require Java version 1.4.0 for operation.
The framework shall use TCP/IP for sending unicast messages.
The framework shall use UDP for sending broadcast messages.
